1010101010110010001111101101111100010000001100110011100111000101001000010000 - ASI: 30

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  010 = 01 * 0
  101 = 1 * 01
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0001 = 00 * 01
  1100 = 11 * 00
  1111 = 11 * 11
  01010 = 01 * 010
  01101 = 01 * 101
  10101 = 101 * 01
  11001 = 1100 * 1
  000100 = 0001 * 00
  0100001 = 010 * 0001
  00001100 = 0000 * 1100
  110001010 = 1100 * 01010
  110010001 = 11001 * 0001
  111101101 = 1111 * 01101
  1010101010 = 10101 * 01010
  1100111001 = 11001 * 11001
  1111000100 = 1111 * 000100
  01000010000 = 0100001 * 0000
  000011001100111001 = 00001100 * 1100111001
  1010101010110010001 = 1010101010 * 110010001
  1111011011111000100 = 111101101 * 1111000100
  11000101001000010000 = 110001010 * 01000010000
  00001100110011100111000101001000010000 = 000011001100111001 * 11000101001000010000
  10101010101100100011111011011111000100 = 1010101010110010001 * 1111011011111000100
  1010101010110010001111101101111100010000001100110011100111000101001000010000 = 10101010101100100011111011011111000100 * 00001100110011100111000101001000010000
